string.text: "Ambush": plant the charges.
Proceed to the marked location and place the assembled explosive device there.
"Ambush": plant the charges.
Proceed to the marked location and place the assembled explosive device there.
"Ambush": plant the charges.
Proceed to the marked location and place the assembled explosive device there.
"Ambush": meet with the Freedom member.
The Freedom agent who saved you has arranged a meeting. Go to the indicated area and find out why they need you.
"Ambush": open the stash.
The Freedom member tasked you with eliminating a band of renegades who are hindering his investigation. Go to his stash to retrieve components for assembling the explosive device.
"Ambush": assemble the explosive charges.
Use the special device to assemble the explosive charges.
"Ambush": plant the charges at the marked locations.
Follow the marker waypoints and plant explosive devices at each of the three locations.
"Ambush": wait for the bandits to appear.
Wait for the bandit group to arrive while remaining in a safe observation point.
"Ambush": wait for the charges to detonate.
The bandits have moved into the area you mined. Wait for the explosions to take them out.
"Ambush": inspect the ambush site.
The charges you planted detonated. The squad has been neutralized. Inspect the ambush site and finish off any wounded survivors if anyone managed to survive.
"Ambush": return to the Freedom member.
The squad you destroyed — supposedly bandits — turned out to be an actual Clear Sky combat unit. Return to your employer and demand an explanation.
"Ambush": eliminate the enemy squad.
The charges you assembled failed to detonate. You must eliminate the enemy group through direct confrontation.
"Ambush": return to the Freedom member.
The squad you destroyed — supposedly bandits — turned out to be an actual Clear Sky combat unit. Return to your employer and demand an explanation.
"Information Gathering": go to the stalker base.
Travel to the local independent stalkers' base in search of work and information.
"Information Gathering": obtain information about the scientists.

Try to gain the trust of the local stalkers and gather any information about the missing group of scientists and the Clear Sky search squad. Someone has surely heard or seen something. Any information can be important, so don't be stingy with the price for it.
"Klyk": find the stalker named Klyk.

Anubis told you there is a stalker who can shed light on how Clear Sky was connected to the disappearance of the scientists. Get all the necessary information from him, but do not kill him — he may still be useful.
"Klyk": get out of the Zone.

Klyk revealed recent events and confirmed Anubis's information about Clear Sky. It is now too dangerous to stay here — leave the location as soon as possible, otherwise you'll be used up like an expendable pawn.
"On the Trail": find the scientists and the Clear Sky group.
Your main objective is to carry out the contract given by Clear Sky to locate the missing scientists and the Clear Sky detachment that followed their trail.
"On the Trail": meet the Clear Sky contact.
The contact from the group that issued your contract has made contact. Meet him, report what you've discovered, and receive new instructions.
"Vengeance": eliminate the bandit group.
A few punks killed the mentor you were assigned to. Track them down and wipe them out before they join a bigger gang of cutthroats.
"Vengeance": interrogate the wounded bandit.
Interrogate the wounded bandit and find out where the last runaway bastard might have gone.
"Vengeance": finish off the wounded bandit.
One of the scum was wounded by his own buddy. Finish him off.
"Vengeance": interrogate the captured bandit.
The trader sent word — the locals captured the last thug. Interrogate him before they carve him up for killing their friend.
"Vengeance": wait until the stalkers deal with the killer.
The bandit revealed some very interesting information about local mercenaries and the clan leader’s deputy. Keep this info in your back pocket as an ace up your sleeve.
"Vengeance": return to the trader.
Report back to the trader about the successful completion of the mission.
"Decoy": stash the documents.
The trader asks you to hide documents for a contact in a special stash. You don’t know what they contain, but the info inside might have a serious impact on future events.
"Decoy": meet with the bandits.
Deliver a couple of artifacts from the trader to the bandit leader. Why this is needed is unclear, but do it anyway and be careful — you can expect anything from bandits.
"Decoy": eliminate the bandits.
Just as the trader predicted, the bandits tried to kill you. Wipe them out.
"Decoy": return to the trader for answers.
The purpose of this assignment makes no sense. The trader basically sent you straight into a death trap with the bandits. Demand an explanation from him about why this had to be done.
"Rescue the Wounded": head to the village to help the injured scout.
The medic received an urgent message from the scout squad’s commander. One of his men is wounded and needs immediate help. Go to the squad’s position in the village.
"Rescue the Wounded": deliver the medkit to Lame.
The wounded scout will live. Hand the reusable medkit over to their commander.
"Artifact Order": find two artifacts — "Paradise Apple" and "Fireball".
Yelimei tasked you with finding two artifacts for him: "Paradise Apple" and "Fireball". They can be found near two major anomaly fields...
"Artifact Order": deliver both artifacts to the client.
You must hand both artifacts over to the client.
"Artifact Order": find the "Paradise Apple".
One artifact has been found. Now you need to get the second.
"Artifact Order": find the "Fireball".
One artifact has been found. Now you need to get the second.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the first scanner.
Jorah tasked you with collecting the anomaly scanners he set up. Go to the first anomaly and pick it up.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the second scanner.
Go to the second anomaly and pick up the scanner placed there.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the third scanner.
Go to the third anomaly and pick up the scanner placed there.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the fourth scanner.
Go to the fourth anomaly and pick up the scanner placed there.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the fifth scanner.
Go to the fifth anomaly and pick up the scanner placed there.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the sixth scanner.
Go to the sixth anomaly and pick up the scanner placed there.
"Anomaly Scanners": retrieve the seventh scanner.
Go to the seventh anomaly and pick up the scanner placed there.
"Anomaly Scanners": deliver the collected scanners.
Return to Jorah and hand him all the scanners you collected.
"Mutant Hunt": proceed to the target location.
Snakecatcher tasked you with eliminating a nest of poltergeists. Go there and destroy the mutants.
"Mutant Hunt": talk to the stalker.
A group of unknown stalkers has approached the battle site. Find out who they are and what they want. If they’re a threat — eliminate them.
"Mutant Hunt": return to the hunter.
The small assignment to clear the mutant nest is done. Report back to your employer.
"Mutant Hunt": proceed to the hunters' squad.
Zmeelov has put you under the command of one of his men. Go to the hunters' camp, where their leader will give you further details.
"Mutant Hunt": eliminate the swamp creatures.
Finist tasked you with eliminating a group of strange swamp creatures spotted near an old fishing hamlet. Do it.
"Mutant Hunt": return to Finist.
The swamp beasts are destroyed. Return to Finist for further instructions.
"Mutant Hunt": report back to Zmeelov.
Finist thinks you did a good job. Return to Zmeelov and report. Also deliver the sum of money Finist gave you.
"Stalker Caches": place the stash at the first location.
You need to set up the issued stalker backpack as a stash.
"Stalker Caches": place the stash at the second location.
You need to set up the issued stalker backpack as a stash.
"Stalker Caches": place the stash at the third location.
You need to set up the issued stalker backpack as a stash.
"Stalker Caches": fill the stash at the first location.
You need to stock the stalker cache with supplies and weapons. The list: "Bear" detector, AK-104 rifle, a pack of ammo, one antirad, one medkit, one bandage, one can of canned food.
"Stalker Caches": fill the stash at the second location.
You need to stock the stalker cache with supplies and weapons. The list: "Bear" detector, AK-104 rifle, a pack of ammo, one antirad, one medkit, one bandage, one can of canned food.
"Stalker Caches": fill the stash at the third location.
You need to stock the stalker cache with supplies and weapons. The list: "Bear" detector, AK-104 rifle, a pack of ammo, one antirad, one medkit, one bandage, one can of canned food.
"Stalker Caches": place all stashes.
You must place the stalker stashes at the three locations marked by the supplier.
"Stalker Caches": return to the supplier.
Go back to the supplier for further instructions.
"Stalker Caches": fill all three stashes.
Now you must stock all the previously placed stashes with supplies.
"Stalker Caches": return to base.
Return to base and report the completion of the task.
"Radiation Survey": measure radiation levels in the designated area.
The scout leader ordered you to conduct a radiation survey of the area. Head to the designated zone and take readings with the special dosimeter.
"Radiation Survey": deliver the readings to the scout.
Return to the squad and hand over the recorded readings to their leader.
"Radars": deploy all radars along the perimeter.
The radioman tasked you with installing military "Kredo-1E" radars. Go to the three designated points and deploy them.
"Radars": return to the radioman.
The ground surveillance radars are deployed. However, one of them may have been misconfigured. Return to the radioman for further instructions.
"Radars": fine-tune one of the stations.
As suspected, one of the stations was not properly configured. Use the special control panel to adjust it.
"Radars": report completion.
Return to base and report the successful completion of the task.
"Radars": set up the radar at the first location.
Proceed to the first point on the map and install the tracking radar there.
"Radars": secure the necessary equipment.
Assemble the device’s components into a working system.
"Radars": set up the radar at the second location.
Proceed to the second point on the map and install the tracking radar there.
"Radars": secure the necessary equipment.
Assemble the device’s components into a working system.
"Radars": set up the radar at the third location.
Proceed to the third point on the map and install the tracking radar there.
"Radars": secure the necessary equipment.
Assemble the device’s components into a working system.
"Gas Mask Testing": collect the necessary equipment.
The mechanic at the base tasked you with testing five models of gas masks for possible future procurement. Collect the required equipment from the crate.
"Gas Mask Testing": prepare the masks for testing.
Use the special equipment to prepare the samples for testing.
"Gas Mask Testing": proceed to the testing site.
The gas mask trials will be carried out in a designated zone. Head there.
"Gas Mask Testing": perform the sample tests.
While the chloropicrin grenades are active, conduct testing of the five different gas masks with various filters.
"Gas Mask Testing": deliver the test results to the technician.
Return to base and hand the test results over to the technician.
"Chemical Recon": measure possible chemical contamination levels in the designated area.
The scout leader ordered you to conduct a chemical reconnaissance of the area. Head to the designated location and take readings with the VPHR device.
"Chemical Recon": deliver the readings to the scout.
Return to the squad and hand the recorded readings to their leader.
"Faulty Radio Station": head to the installation site.
One of the faction's hidden radio stations has stopped working. Go to its location and extract the circuit boards.
"Faulty Radio Station": test the extracted circuits with a multimeter.
You need to identify the malfunction in the radio station’s modules. Use the standard multimeter for diagnostics.
"Faulty Radio Station": return to the radioman.
The multimeter revealed that one of the system boards was damaged, most likely due to external interference. Return to the radioman for further instructions.
"Faulty Radio Station": use the soldering station.
The radioman said he would report to command that the station was deliberately sabotaged. Your task is to restore its operation. Start by resoldering the damaged elements on the board.
"Faulty Radio Station": install the radio station in a new location.
To prevent another act of sabotage, it was decided to reinstall the radio station in another area with a different coverage zone.
"Faulty Radio Station": insert the previously extracted system boards.
The station is in place. Now insert the previously removed electronic modules.
"Faulty Radio Station": report completion of the task.
Return to the radioman and report successful completion of the mission.
"Radio Testing": proceed to the testing area.
The mechanic tasked you with testing five models of portable radios. Based on the results, he will select the most suitable one for bulk procurement. Assist him with the testing.
"Radio Testing": report back.
Return to the mechanic and report successful completion of the task.
"At the Crossroads": collect the required items from the mechanic.
You decided to support the clan’s deputy in his plan. He ordered you to eliminate Khromy’s group. Collect everything you need for this from the mechanic.
"At the Crossroads": assemble the gas mask with a poisoned filter.
Khromy must be eliminated without leaving any trace. Prepare a batch of gas masks with poisoned filters.
"At the Crossroads": plant the chemical bomb with a catalyst.
To wipe out Khromy’s group, prepare a special trap. Plant an explosive charge with a chemical payload that will act as a catalyst for releasing poison in the gas mask filters.
"At the Crossroads": deliver the gas masks to Khromy.
Go to the scouts’ group and hand them the gas masks along with additional instructions from the deputy.
"At the Crossroads": take the designated position.
For now, stay away from the base to avoid arousing suspicion.
"At the Crossroads": wait for the chemical trap to trigger.
Wait for the observer’s signal. The deputy’s man will send it once the explosive trap goes off and he confirms the group’s death. Once that happens, the job is done.
"At the Crossroads": report back to the deputy.
Return to the base and inform the deputy that you received confirmation of Khromy’s group being eliminated.
"At the Crossroads": collect all necessary items from the supplier.

You decided to side with the clan leader in his conflict with the deputy. First, you need to investigate the death of the scout group and check for Hassan's possible involvement. Collect all necessary equipment from the supplier for examining the site of the group’s death.
"At the Crossroads": inspect the site of the group’s death.
Use the special spectrometer to take samples at the site of the group’s death. You might discover something.
"At the Crossroads": consult with the technician.

The spectrometer showed traces of rare chemicals at the site. Alone, they are harmless, but combined with others, they form a deadly mixture. They also cannot be products of anomalous reactions. Talk to the technician to see if he knows anything about these substances.
"At the Crossroads": locate Hassan’s men or their possible stash.

The technician told you he was involved in supplying and setting up devices with such chemical content, but never imagined they could be used as covert weapons. He revealed who took the components—it was Hassan’s men. Check the location where they were last seen.
"At the Crossroads": eliminate Hassan’s men and unlock their stash using the keys.

At the location provided by the technician, you found a mercenary stash. It needs to be opened. The technician also sent coordinates where the mercenaries themselves might be. Most likely, he just turned them in.
"At the Crossroads": report all findings to the faction leader.
The mercenary stash contained a dossier shedding light on Hassan and his operations. Present it to Harold as evidence of Hassan’s guilt.
"At the Crossroads": eliminate the first member of Hassan’s gang.
Eliminate one of the mercenaries.
"At the Crossroads": retrieve the key from the mercenary.
Search the body of Hassan’s man and take his key to the stash.
"At the Crossroads": eliminate the second member of Hassan’s gang.
Eliminate one of the mercenaries.
"At the Crossroads": retrieve the key from the mercenary.
Search the body of Hassan’s man and take his key to the stash.
"The Liaison": meet with the Freedom scout.
The "Clear Sky" liaison arranged a meeting as Hassan promised. However, an urgent message arrived from the Freedom agent. Find out what he needs.
"The Liaison": proceed to meet the "Clear Sky" agent.
Despite Anubis’ warning, you still went to meet the client.
"The Liaison": eliminate the Clear Sky members.
The Freedom agent was right about the "Clear Sky" faction. At the meeting, they tried to kill you. Eliminate them.
"Setup": meet with the Freedom scout.
You shouldn’t have doubted the Freedom agent. "Clear Sky" used you and decided to eliminate you as soon as you were no longer needed.
"Setup": prepare the trap.
Convince Hassan that "Clear Sky" eliminated one of the syndicate’s men he worked with. Anubis will lure the winged squad to the village. The mercenaries should arrive there as well.
"Setup": eliminate everyone in the village.
Set "Clear Sky" against the mercenaries. This is only the first step. Let them fight each other like rats. Finish off any survivors.
"Reckoning": restock the Freedom scout’s stash.
To carry out the next operation, you need to replenish your supplies. Do this and receive additional instructions from Anubis.
"Reckoning": eliminate the stalker base.
Go to the free stalkers’ base and eliminate everyone remaining there. This is necessary to cover your tracks. Most of the guards won’t be present—they will be distracted by the Freedom scout.
"Finale": eliminate the group of scientists you were supposed to save.
Follow Anubis’ orders and dispose of the “spent material” in this grim multi-step scheme.
"Finale": plant the chemical explosive.
Some scientists might still be hiding in the lower levels of the bunker. Plant the bombs with chemical payloads to eliminate any survivors.
"Finale": wait for the detonator to activate.
Wait for the bomb to go off. It’s best to stay at a safe distance during detonation.
"Finale": meet with Anubis.
The task assigned by the Freedom scout has been completed. Go to him for further instructions, if any.
"Clearance": search for mercenary-placed mines.
Go to the abandoned area recently visited by mercenaries and scout the terrain for possible mines or traps.
"Clearance": return to the scout leader in the village.
All mines have been found and safely disarmed. Return to your employer.
"Clearance": fend off a mutant wave.
The scouts’ and free stalkers’ camp was attacked by mutants. Fight them off.
"Finale": meet with Anubis.
Proceed to meet the Freedom agent.
"Finale": eliminate the "Clear Sky" informant.
Go to the designated area and kill the "Clear Sky" agent.
"Finale": contact the "Clear Sky" squad.
Send a message to the "Clear Sky" assault squad via the free stalkers’ radio operator.
"Finale": eliminate the dispatched assault squad.
The "Clear Sky" group was supposed to occupy the central checkpoint. Move to the location and eliminate them.
"Finale": kill the remaining scientists.
Go to the location where the missing scientist squad had been hiding for a long time and eliminate those remaining.
"Finale": return to Anubis.
The Freedom agent's instructions have been completed. Report back to him.
"Finale": eliminate the agent of the sinners.
At the very last moment, doubts arose about the chosen path. Becoming an agent of the sinners is not what you aimed for. Eliminate Anubis.
"Finale": proceed to Harold.
Accept Harold’s offer to join his faction. Perhaps this new chapter will help you forget everything that happened here.
"Syndicate Case": locate the mercenary stash.
A note found on a Syndicate fighter’s body hints at a mercenary stash nearby. Find it. It could be hidden in caves or the village.
"Syndicate Case": disarm the stash.
You need to figure out the code mercenaries use to open the stash. Do not attempt to force it—it is likely booby-trapped. The code may be known by a stalker working for the Syndicate.
"Syndicate Case": rush to the base.
The Syndicate stash contained a surprise—a built-in poison gas canister. Whether it was intentional is unknown. Return to the base as soon as possible for the antidote.
"Syndicate Case": go to the medic.
An unknown Freedom scout saved your life. Visit the medic as advised.
"Arrival": talk to the Freedom member.
From the start, you were unlucky enough to encounter a Freeman patrol. Find out what they need.
"Arrival": meet the Freedom squad leader.
Talk to the leader of the Freedom scouts. Perhaps you can gain information on the missing scientists. Try to take the risk and deceive them by posing as the stalker the patrol expected.
"Arrival": triangulate the missing scout’s signal.
The Freedom leader is willing to share information if you help locate one of their missing people. Go to the location of their last signal and attempt to triangulate it.
"Arrival": return to the squad.
Return to the commander and deliver the information obtained using the handheld triangulator.
"Arrival": eliminate the Duty squad.
The Freedom stalkers were killed by their eternal enemies—the Duty. They mistook you for an ally of Freedom. Eliminate the Duty members.
"Choosing a Side": decide whose side to take.
The conflict between the deputy and the clan leader may escalate far more than it seemed initially. Your intervention is required. Choose whose side to take — Harold’s or Hasan’s.
Elimei’s Task: find the "Firefly" and "Meat Chunk" artifacts.
Elimei asked for your help to find two artifacts, "Firefly" and "Meat Chunk," mentioned by a dying stalker.
Elimei’s Task: find the "Meat Chunk" artifact.
The "Firefly" artifact has been found. Now find the "Meat Chunk."
Elimei’s Task: find the "Firefly" artifact.
The "Meat Chunk" artifact has been found. Now locate the "Firefly."
Elimei’s Task: deliver the artifacts to Elimei.
Both artifacts have been successfully located at the place Elimei indicated. Deliver them to the medic and collect your reward.
Isai’s Task: collect artifacts from gatherers.
The supplier arranged with Jorah for you to collect artifacts from stalkers. At Isai’s personal request, inform each gatherer about the new stash locations.
Isai’s Task: deliver the collected artifacts to Isai.
The plan is complete—each gatherer received the necessary information. Now return to the base and deliver all artifacts to the client.
Isai’s Task: go to the first gatherer.
Meet the first gatherer, collect their load, and pass on the information Isai gave you.
Isai’s Task: go to the second gatherer.
Meet the second gatherer, collect their load, and pass on the information Isai provided.
Isai’s Task: go to the third gatherer.
Meet the third gatherer, collect their load, and pass on the information Isai gave you.
Night Predator: meet with Yakut.
The hunter assigned you to eliminate the night predator attacking gatherer groups. Meet with one of the clan’s most experienced hunters for the joint hunt.
Night Predator: scout the area.
Try to occupy the local farms as stealthily as possible together with the hunter.
Night Predator: clarify the plan.
Talk to Yakut again to finalize the plan of action.
Night Predator: eliminate the second chimera.
Yakut informed you that two predators are active in the area. The hunter suggested splitting forces. Take on the creature that is likely wounded and recently escaped into the forest.
Night Predator: return to Yakut.
One of the two night predators has been eliminated. However, there were no sounds of gunfire. Check on Yakut.
Night Predator: return to the base immediately.
Yakut has disappeared. One predator is dead, but the second’s status is unknown. Considering the disappearance of a more experienced hunter, it’s safer to return to the client.
Artifact Collector: deliver the package to the artifact collector.
With your help, Isai identified which artifact collector was involved in banditry. Now you need to eliminate them. Deliver the package as a "gift."
Artifact Collector: return to Isai.
Report back to the client about the successful completion of the task.
Artifact Collector: escort Mahir to the southern checkpoint.

You didn’t believe Isai’s story about the gatherers’ involvement in attacks. Help the person you were supposed to eliminate. Lead him to a safe area so he can escape, but insist on taking him specifically to the southern checkpoint.
Artifact Collector: discuss with the gatherer.
Talk with Mahir again about the details of his escape and what you will need to tell Isai afterward.
Artifact Collector: return to the client.
Go back to the base and lie to Isai that you eliminated the unwanted gatherer. You may have been wrong in your choice, but that’s now your responsibility.
Artifact Collector: go with the gatherer to the northern checkpoint.
You didn’t believe Isai regarding the gatherers and decided to save Mahir. You agreed to his terms to lead him through the northern checkpoint.
Artifact Collector: discuss with Mahir again.
It seems you agreed to help him in vain and ignored the client. Your greed may cost you dearly.
Artifact Collector: eliminate Mahir and the bandits.
Isai was right all along. The artifact collector Mahir was one of the bandits carrying out sabotage against the clan. He also led you into an ambush. Eliminate him.
Artifact Collector: return to the client.
Return to the client and report that the collector has been eliminated. Hopefully, you’ll have the sense to keep quiet about your attempt to deceive him.
Jorah’s Task: find the "Dragon Eye" artifact.
The client tasked you with locating one of the rare artifacts — "Dragon Eye." Go to the indicated area to investigate the anomaly.
Jorah’s Task: reach the base alive.

It was likely a trap. The Duty faction tracked you down and decided to get revenge. They didn’t kill you immediately — they stunned you and left you without weapons or gear. Your only chance to survive is to reach the base.
Jorah’s Task: seek help from the faction leaders.
Duty will not forgive you for killing their people, even though you survived their "cruel game." Seek help from Hasan or Harold.
Jorah’s Task: find the "Black Soul" artifact.
The client tasked you with locating one of the rare artifacts — "Black Soul." Go to the indicated area to investigate the anomaly.
Jorah’s Task: reach the base alive.

It was likely a trap. The Freedom faction tracked you down and decided to get revenge. They didn’t kill you immediately — they stunned you and left you without weapons or gear. Your only chance to survive is to reach the base.
Jorah’s Task: seek help from the faction leaders.
Freedom will not forgive you for killing their people, even though you survived their "cruel game." Seek help from Hasan or Harold.
Artifact Selection: sort the provided artifacts.
Jorah assigned you to sort identical artifacts across three different chemical anomalies. This will help study them better and understand their formation and effects.
Artifact Selection: return to the client.
The artifacts were modified in a special device under anomalous activity. Deliver the resulting samples to the client.
Revenge on Duty: eliminate Duty members at the checkpoint.
Use Hasan’s offer to help deal with problems caused by Duty. Follow his instructions and occupy the checkpoint they control.
Revenge on Duty: return to Hasan.
You completed your part of the operation. The rest is up to Hasan’s people. They must ensure that suspicion of an attack on Duty stalkers does not fall on you.
Revenge on Duty: eliminate Duty members at the checkpoint.
Use Harold’s offer to help deal with problems caused by Duty. Follow his instructions and occupy the checkpoint they control.
Revenge on Duty: return to Harold.
You completed your part of the operation. The rest is up to Harold’s people. They must ensure that suspicion of an attack on Duty stalkers does not fall on you.
Revenge on Freedom: eliminate Freedom members at the checkpoint.
Use Hasan’s offer to help deal with issues caused by Freedom. Follow his instructions and occupy the checkpoint they control.
Revenge on Freedom: return to Hasan.
You completed your part of the operation. The rest is up to Hasan’s people. They must ensure that suspicion of an attack on Freedom stalkers does not fall on you.
Revenge on Freedom: eliminate Freedom members at the checkpoint.
Use Harold’s offer to help deal with issues caused by Freedom. Follow his instructions and occupy the checkpoint they control.
Revenge on Freedom: return to Harold.
You completed your part of the operation. The rest is up to Harold’s people. They must ensure that suspicion of an attack on Freedom stalkers does not fall on you.
Technician’s Task: go to the technician’s assistant.
The technician asked you to test three samples of different night vision devices. Go to the assistant to conduct the tests.
Technician’s Task: start the first night vision device.
Turn on the first night vision device sample to conduct the test.
Technician’s Task: wait for testing to finish.
Wait while the assistant makes the necessary adjustments to the first device.
Technician’s Task: take the second sample for testing.
Take the second night vision device sample from the assistant.
Technician’s Task: start the second night vision device.
Turn on the second night vision device sample to conduct the test.
Technician’s Task: wait for testing to finish.
Wait while the assistant makes the necessary adjustments to the second device.
Technician’s Task: take the third sample for testing.
Take the third night vision device sample from the assistant.
Technician’s Task: start the third night vision device.
Turn on the third night vision device sample to conduct the test.
Technician’s Task: wait for testing to finish.
Wait while the assistant makes the necessary adjustments to the third device.
Technician’s Task: return to the technician.
Return to the base and report to the client about the successful completion of the task.
Unknown Danger: urgently go to the radio operator.
Hurry to the base to see the radio operator. One of the installed radars has detected something strange and your help is needed.
Unknown Danger: proceed to the designated location.
You need to find out what the radar detected. Also, investigate the fate of the scout team sent to that area.
Unknown Danger: eliminate the scouts who have lost their minds.
Something terrible has happened here. Unknown anomaly, insane stalkers. Save your life.
Unknown Danger: leave the area immediately.
Psi shock. Either an anomaly or some mutant. Get out of here.
Unknown Danger: speak with the medic.
It is unclear what happened. You killed the scouts, then the shock, and then nothing. Ask the medic what exactly occurred.
Unknown Danger: report the events to the radio operator.
The medic said you were found unconscious. The anomaly is gone. What it was — unknown. Report everything you remember to the radio operator.
Czech’s Task: install the jamming generator in the designated area.
Go to the farms and set up the required equipment, disguised as ordinary crates.
Czech’s Task: return to the employer.
Return to the base and report task completion to Czech.
Czech’s Task: install the electronic system in the designated area.
Go to the village and install the required equipment, disguised as ordinary crates.
Czech’s Task: return to the employer.
Return to the base and report task completion to Czech.
Harold’s Task: go to the faction leader.
The stalker leader requests you to come to him urgently. This is important, so do not delay.
Harold’s Task: eliminate Hasan.
Harold tasked you with eliminating his deputy, who betrayed him and started his own scheme. Do this according to one of the instructions you received.
Harold’s Task: eliminate Hasan’s squad.
Go to the specified area and deal with Hasan’s squad.
Harold’s Task: return to the leader.
Report back to the client on the successful completion of the task.
Harold’s Task: plant the explosive charge.
Deal with Hasan by blowing him up at the base. Use the charge filled with a special chemical poison.
Harold’s Task: wait for the explosive to detonate.
Wait until the chemical explosive (CHEM) goes off.
Harold’s Task: return to the leader.
Report to the client about the successful completion of the task.
Hasan’s Task: go to the deputy leader of the faction.
The deputy leader of the stalkers urgently requests you to come to him. This is important, so do not delay.
Hasan’s Task: eliminate Harold.
Hasan tasked you with eliminating the clan leader, who can no longer properly lead the clan and is only an obstacle to the deputy gaining power. Follow one of the instructions you received.
Hasan’s Task: eliminate Harold’s squad.
Go to the specified area and deal with Harold’s men.
Hasan’s Task: return to the deputy leader.
Report to the client about the successful completion of the task.
Hasan’s Task: plant the explosive charge.
Deal with Harold by blowing him up at the base. Use the charge filled with a special chemical poison.
Hasan’s Task: wait for the explosive to detonate.
Wait until the chemical explosive (CHEM) goes off.
Hasan’s Task: return to the deputy leader.
Report to the client about the successful completion of the task.
Meeting with the Agent: speak with Czech.
Czech told you not to meet Anubis under any circumstances. Go to him for further details.
Deception: go to the base.
Czech suggested following his plan. First, return to the base and ask the radio operator to contact the Clear Sky agent to arrange a meeting.
Deception: meet the Clear Sky agent.
Go to the Clear Sky agent and propose an exchange of the group of scientists on your terms.
The Sky Saw Everything: eliminate the Clear Sky squad.
Destroy the Clear Sky squad sent here for a cleanup operation. Czech was right — your contract with the feathered ones turned out to be a one-way ticket. Eliminate your employers.
Covering Tracks: speak with Czech.
Meet with the mercenary agent to discuss the next course of action.
Covering Tracks: clear the base of free stalkers.

Czech informed you that the original plan failed. The local stalker clan, now led by Hasan, has declared a hunt for you due to the destruction of the Clear Sky group. Most likely, the culprit is the sinner Anubis. You must urgently cover your tracks before the situation escalates further.
Finale: meet with Anubis.
The sinner agent has contacted you and arranged a meeting. Find out what he wants.
Finale: wait and see what happens.
What the agent tells you may shock you. Even more shocking is that he plans to shoot himself right before your eyes.
Finale: report to Czech.
Report to Czech what happened and what the sinner agent revealed to you.
